review_text: Awesome park with lots of wildlife including resident koalas. Cabins were very clean and well maintained. Had great kitchen equipment and appliances to cook with. Well spaced so not too close to neighbours. Great location for this part of the island.

Accueil excellent avec toutes les informations nécessaires par une Italienne. Boutique ouverte de 08h30 à 17h00 avec ce qu'il faut pour manger. Bungalow 34 très bien avec terrasse et les kangourous juste devant. Parfait pour visiter le Sud Ouest de Kangaroo island et notamment le parc de Flinders.
Schöner ruhiger Platz, nahe am Nationalpark, Koalas und Kangeruhs auf dem Platz,  beste Campkitchen ever!

Accueillant, convicial.
Bonnes indications pour trouver des Koalas, dans le camp 👍Attention aux horaires ouverture 8h30 fermeture 17h00.
Boutique permettant d'acheter à manger. Petit déjeuner possible café/ muffins (bons)

The cabin was a clean, comfortable, and natural place to stay. As soon as you opened the door, you could see kangaroos, koalas, and many different kinds of birds and insects.

It had everything you needed, including a kitchen, dining area, and living room. Spending a night surrounded by nature was a wonderful experience, and I felt so refreshed the next day.

The "motel style rooms" here are more like staying at a mining camp. Rooms are basic and without any effort to make them look pleasant or warm. They have extra spice in the form of the whitest and brightest light globes I've ever come across. They really enhance the stark white walls, creating a clinical environment perfect for surgery. The one window directly faces the cabin over, 1m away. Blinds down it is. A wooden deck runs through the middle of the dongas, so that every footstep of passing neighbours reverberates through the walls and floor of your small white prison.
There is a shared kitchen space in the middle of the 10 rooms. I was lucky enough to be opposite it, so I also heard chairs being dragged around and the door to the kitchen slamming closed 5 times per hour, literally shaking my room.
If you want shelter from the elements this will do. The shower was hot and the bed comfortable. However I have words to say to whoever approved this brand new overpriced dump.

Awesome stay.

Stayed in a cabin.

Fully self contained.

Kitchen, oven, utensils, AC/Heating, koalas in the surrounding trees.

Very peaceful.

Highly recommended.
Perfecto lugar para visitar Flinders Chase, lleno de animales salvajes.
We didn’t have a camper van so we were in a cabin. It was very clean and had a full kitchen. The store at reception had food/drink options.  We enjoyed seeing wildlife on the grounds.
... has everything! Absolutely perfect. :-)

Chris Traeger and my girl Margaret were absolutely unbelievable with the entire experience. Check in was a breeze. The rooms and the whole facility of the park was mesmerising. Chris our man was a gun in the garden and went about his hard work completely unnoticed. The coffee he made was better than a baristas. Entire experience a 10/10 and would live there if I could.

Diese Anlage ist hervorragend und zu 100% zu empfehlen. Der Bungalow hat alles was man zum Übernachten benötigt. Vom Fön, Pflegeprodukte bis zum Wasserkocher ist alles. Die Betten sind sehr gut und der Bungalow sowie die gesamte Anlage sind sauber und gepflegt.Die Lage ist optimal für Ausflüge. Das Personal ist freundlich und hilfsbereit.

would like to highly recommend this accommodation. I chose this accommodation mainly so that we could have separate beds, which was great to have a cabin with two bedrooms and queen-size beds. Very comfortable. The cabin had a bathroom, kitchenette, and living room. Everything was very nice. The camp environment was great. We arrived before dusk and there were kangaroos near us in the camp. In the morning, we saw koalas in the eucalyptus trees. The lady at the reception was great, she explained everything to us and even told us where we could see koalas in the camp. On which trees and near which cabin numbers. There is also a small grocery store at the reception desk. It is open during the same hours as the reception desk, from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. There is also a small gas station. Thank you very much.

Good Campsite very close of the Flinders NP.
The welcome was good with plenty of explanation about the walks nearby. And the must plenty of animals in the campsite (koalas, kangoorous, wallabies,goose,...).
Also the facilities are quite good.

Stayed in our van. Had a koala in a tree above our van which was amazing. A large spot so heaps of room to spread out and nice and shady.

Amenities were clean but water pressure in our van was very poor (not sure if that's a kangaroo island thing ?)

Absolutely delighted at how clean the cabins are, a credit to the park management
The park is delightful and the only thing I could suggest for improvement would be a jumping pillow

Spacious sites, facilities are plentiful and super clean. A very comfortable camp ground with wildlife aplenty.
Staff are very welcoming and friendly, and the reception area has lots of supplies.

Just spent a week at the park in a cabin. The cabins are small but were clean & had everything we could need. Park was well maintained & camp kitchen, bbq & seating was great - spent plenty of time reading in the arv in the comfy seating. Island was amazing & so worth a weeks visit.

Stayed 4 nights and love exploring around the area!

Perfect park to explore Remarkable Rocks, Admirals arch as well as walks and hikes in the Flinders Chase national park.

Sites are large and roomy.

Kangaroos and koalas roam through the park!

Didn’t use them but kitchen looked fab.

Chris and Margaret were exceptional hosts and clearly love their job! All the staff were so friendly.

Loved our time - thank you!

We only stayed for one night, but we absolutely loved it. There was the cutest koala right in front of our caravan site, the bathroom and kitchen facilities were clean, and the staff were very helpful. We would definitely stay again.

Given the island’s isolated location, there is only so much one can reasonably complain about. That said, several facilities were either unusable or equipped with damaged utensils, which detracted from the overall experience. The shared fridge was not well maintained, with spoiled food—such as a rotten tomato—left inside without being cleaned up. The rooms also lack adequate soundproofing; mornings can be particularly disruptive, with neighbouring guests moving around as early as 5 a.m. without consideration for others who may still be asleep.

The kitchen instructions are unclear and poorly labelled. For example, the grill is difficult to operate, and it is not obvious how or where to turn on the exhaust fan, which could easily confuse travellers unfamiliar with the setup.

While there is a petrol refuelling facility on-site, the absence of EV charging is disappointing. As a result, I had to rely on the nearby visitor centre for charging, which is only available during the daytime and limits flexibility for EV users.

We did stayed in the powered site and I loved every second at Discovery Parks KI, Margaret and Chris were so knowledgeable and kind to explain everything and also gave us a couple of stubby holders for our stay. Amenities full equipped and always clean. The best part? They have 9 koalas in the park, so if you want to see them in the wild and its own habitat, this is the place for it. Thank you!!!!

Great location to access Flinders Chase National Park. Greeted warmly with a smile and jovially by Chris and Margaret. Cabin is very clean and well maintained. Very glad to see them restored after the KI fires.
Herausragende Lage an der Grenze zu Flinders Chase. Auf dem Gelände kann man freilebende Koalas, Kängurus, Wallabys und diverse Vogelarten entdecken. Ein absolutes Highlight auf KI.
非常棒的卧室与浴室，共享厨房干净，东西一应俱全。营地与大自然融为一体，前台阿姨非热情且幽默，很推荐。

Booked a luxury one bedroom cabin . Excellent value approx £100.00 for one night. |The cabin was clean, well equipped, great shower and comfy bed. |It was basic but practical. |Take all your provisions with you including drinking water. There is a shop with limited stock and limited opening hours.|Also a blanket if you want to sit outside it was cool the evening we stayed. |Fortunately the site has not yet installed all the accommodation units so we were fortunate to have kangaroos opposite our cabin enjoying their supper, not sure that would have happened if a cabin had been placed on that area of ground. |If we were visiting again we would take more provisions and stay a couple of nights as there is plenty to visit.

A well positioned caravan park near the entrance to the Flinders Chase National Park, offering cabins or hotel styled rooms.
The park grounds are absolutely amazing, with abundant wildlife on display.
The staff were so obliging and friendly, even going out of their way to open the store for our group.
This is an example, all parks should follow.
Uit de slinger, vriendelijke staf en koala's in de bomen. Ruime plaatsen en goed sanitair.
A very lovely park. Staff was very friendly. Got to see quite a few koalas, wallabies, Cape Barren geese and kangaroos. Also enjoyed it being a dog free park. Really enjoyed our stay there.

We camped here in October & it was by far one of the most gorgeous places we have stayed. We were allocated a camp spot but we asked the next night if we could move to a different site towards the back of the park where is was a bit more quiet, which was no problem at all. The gorgeous ladies were so accommodating & nothing was too much trouble. They were so friendly & were great for advice on what to see & do. The amenities were lovely & clean & the wildlife in the park was just amazing. Being a koala lover I certainly got my fix! We cannot wait to come back. Thank you for a fantastic stay.

The cabins are clean, cozy and well equipped with everything you need. The kids lived the place and we got to see the animals up close and right from our cabins.

Margaret made us feel so welcome. We will definitely be back.

I attended this camping site as a part of a two day Groovy Grapes Kangaroo Island tour and stayed in one of the bell tents. The bell tents w were very nice and the mattress was surprisingly comfortable. The real show stopper is all the wildlife around - there was heaps of Koalas with joeys, kangaroos with joeys, wallabies and cool looking geese. My only complaint is that all the birds and sheep woke me up early in the morning.

Our stay at Discovery Kangaroo Island was absolutely fantastic, and a huge part of that was thanks to Margaret, the Park Manager. From the moment we arrived, she made us feel so welcome and went above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed.
Margaret’s local knowledge was incredible. We were fortunate enough to spot 5 Koalas and we also seen the Cape Barren Goose. The park itself was spotless and beautifully maintained, which clearly reflects her dedication and care.
It’s rare to meet someone who combines professionalism, genuine warmth, and such a passion for their work. Margaret truly made our experience memorable, and we can’t thank her enough. Highly recommend Discovery Kangaroo Island—especially with Margaret at the helm!

Our stay at Discovery Parks Kangaroo Island was excellent. The cabin was clean, comfortable, and located right in front of a large open area with sheep, birds, koalas, and kangaroos — a true Kangaroo Island experience! It’s also in the perfect spot, central to Flinders Chase, Kelly Hill Caves, Vivonne Bay, the Wildlife Park, and other attractions. Highly recommended for families.
Overall nice stay

There is no way I couldn’t give this place five stars! The service alone was out of this world. We have a couple of young kids and we were greeted with such friendly faces and the staff provided lots of things, like prizes, treasure/animal hunts and treats for the kids from day one. They have so much knowledge of the island and pointed us in the right direction that would satisfy our travelling adventure needs including amazing spots for the kids.
We seen more wild life at this park than anywhere else! Koalas, wallaby’s, kangaroos, birds of all kinds and more!
Would’ve been even better if they had a pool! But the beach is so close, it makes up for it.

Thanks again! We WILL be back.

Fantastic stay so close to the national park! We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin, exactly what we needed. Clean and tidy. No complaints. Just note phone reception may not work here. We are Optus and arrived after check in closed. We had no reception to ring after hours for the lock box code to get our key so had to drive 30mins back to get reception, take note and ensure if you are arriving late you call ahead for code. Manager was so lovely.

Perfekte Unterkunft auf Kangoroo Island für zwei Tage Aufenthalt auf der Insel. Zimmer sehr sauber und bestens ausgestattet mit einer vollständigen Küche. Selbstversorgung ist ein must, da es hier keine Restaurants in der Nähe gibt. Dafür Wildlife im Park. Kangoroo, Koalas und Opossums

袋鼠岛上的住宿选择不多，靠近西侧海岸国家公园附近的选择就更少了。预订了 Discovrery Park
后，看酒店的照片还担心是很简陋的民宿，入住时发现担心完全多余的，里面的设施很新、很现代，烤箱、微波炉、煤气灶、热水壶、冰箱、抽油烟机、空调、沙发、餐桌，室外阳台还有桌椅可以小憩，晚上房间外面还能碰到小袋鼠—一连续两个晚上都碰到了，开心非常适合在岛上4-5 点各种餐厅商店都关门的情况下，自己做饭吃的选择，推荐！！

We had the best time staying at Discovery Parks Kangaroo Island!
The location is perfect—a close drive to Flinders Chase National Park, with incredible sights like Remarkable Rocks and Admirals Arch. We also loved visiting nearby spots like the Hanson Bay Wildlife Sanctuary and Kelly Hill Caves.
The park itself is full of amazing wildlife, which made the experience even more special.
All of the staff were absolutely lovely—friendly, welcoming, and always happy to help with anything we needed.
Rooms are spotlessly clean and tidy, and the amenities for campers, including the camp kitchen and toilet blocks, were also well maintained and super convenient.
We’d highly recommend Discovery Parks to anyone visiting the western side of Kangaroo Island.
Thank you so much for having us, it was a stay to remember! 🤍

This location was a stand out for me for the wildlife. I loved all the animal friends across the park. Kristy was so helpful showing us the koalas and her Joey, telling us about big daddy and all the other wildlife. Margaret and Chris were also excellent in being welcoming and friendly. The campsite was a great location for flinders chase.

We stayed here in our motor home. Can highly recommend the place. The toilets/ showers were in self contained units so u had your own shower toilet and basin whenever u used the facilities. Very clean.
The lady who greeted us was very friendly and helpful. They provided coffee from 9 onwards. She showed us where we could spot koalas and their young and we found them easily ( adorable) , about 5or 6, one had its baby . There were kangaroos and echidnas and cape Barron geese also in the park grounds. The grounds were lovely and felt like a farm. There were laundries and lines. The only negative was it costs $9 per wash and $9 per dry. But given the relative isolation it makes some sense that it’s expensive. A very close drive to the national park visitor centre and the admirals arch, fur seals and the remarkables and lighthouse. We stayed 3 nites and had no complaints at all. It’s a wonderful place to stay and does have self contained accomodation units for those with just cars.
Amazing! Extremely friendly staff, wonderful location (with complementary koalas) and wonderful cabin.

Margaret and her staff are simply amazing. Their hospitality knows no bounds. I’ve stayed at dozens of hotels, motels, airbnbs and other accomodation and their service is by far the best. Looking forward to staying here again!

A lovely stay here. From the moment we checked in we felt welcome and that evening we went on the organised Koala walk where we saw two. On Saturday morning Chris made pancakes in the camp kitchen😋Also very clean amenities.

We stayed in a 2 bedroon cabin and it was perfect for 3 nights.|Well equipped cabin with a full kitchen. Warm and lots of space. We were able to cook dinner for ourselves and prepare our lunches for our hikes.
We visited both before & after the 2020 bushfires. While it was sad to see what was lost, the regrowth of flora was exciting to witness.

The place is far out from the ferry terminal. It is for those who want to experience nature and have a quiet stay. Internet connection is bad. Have an early dinner before you head back or get grocery to cook in the cabin.  You can see wild birds and kangaroos in the forest nearby.
Friendly staff who are extremely helpful. Enjoyed our stay in our van. Such a natural setting with abundant wildlife.

We spent a couple of nights in a chalet here.  Very comfortable and the location is superb.  We'd driven straight from the ferry (having started the morning picking up a hire car in Adelaide) and arrived after the (small) shop on site was technically closed but the lady was still on site and happily sold us a couple of bits that we hadn't managed to buy on the mainland - including eggs, which had completely sold out in the Adelaide supermarket we went to (avian flu was causing a general egg shortage that we hadn't been aware of), but which were available on Kangaroo Island!  Great location, but be aware that this is quite remote with very few amenties in the area, so come supplied.  And enjoy the wallabies, koalas and star filled skies.

Booked the Deluxe 1 Bedroom Cabin. Do shop groceries before arrival. Love the heating light in the bathroom. Deck is small, it happened to rain with strong winds, couldn't sit outside to enjoy. Overall, nice and comfy, well appointed cabin. Saw koalas, baron geese and kangaroos. Should have stayed longer to go for more hikes nearby.

I highly recommend staying at Discovery Park, Kangaroo Island. All the staff are very welcoming, warm and friendly. The cabins are extremely clean and are well equipped. A highlight was my daily walk around the park koala spotting. Thank you Margaret, Chris and all the staff for making our trip truly unforgettable .

Margaret and her team went out of their way to help us secure a cabin at their Discovery Park. We felt very welcome and comfortable in both our one and two bedroom cabins. It's simple, clean accommodation in a very convenient location. I only had one issue and it doesn't impact most people (and I forgot to mention it to Margaret) - the cleaning product used in the cabin by the cleaners is so fragrant that it gave me a massive headache and made me feel dizzy. As soon as we entered our cabins, we had to open all of the windows straight away. If you have allergies to strong fragrant chemical smells, then I would let the park know before you travel there. On the bright side, it is very clear that the cabins are super clean - and the sheets are white and crisp. Overall, this is a great spot with reasonable rates to stay while you explore Flinders Chase. I highly recommend it. Thank you so much for having us and for being so accommodating!
The room was small but clean, had all we needed. The self-serve kitchen is clean and spacious. Great value for the location.
Great park. Two stays. We made big demands on the service and facilities and they were all met.

We had a lovely stay here. Cabin was exceptionally clean and had everything we needed. Everything is spread out over a massive area so you don't have to worry about your neighbours making noise. The shop had everything we needed, can definitely recommend the frozen whiting which was delicious! Kangaroos and Cape Barren geese strolling around the park. Friendly service at the front desk. Kids were sorry to leave.
Very relaxing surroundings. Cabins clean and well maintained and the staff were generous and friendly. Great barista coffee a bonus.

Charmant camping ombragé, sanitaires très propres. Accueil parfait hôte à l'écoute et à la disposition du vacancier. Nous a indiqué la fabuleuse visite de raptor domaine. Dans camping vous verrez des koalas et kangourous se promener en toute Liberté. Vraiment super

Wonderful park on the edge of Flinders Chase National park.  Facilities are clean. Camp kitchen is good. The best thing about the park is the wildlife, Koalas,  Roos and birds abound.
A great base for exploring.
Really nice place. Staff is super friendly and helpful. Spotted 4-6 koalas every day right in the campground. Also great location for the park. Highly recommend
Great spot nice and clean great staff

We spent two nights at Kangaroo Island Discovery Parks, and it was a wonderful place to stay. Located away from the busy areas, this cosy little house was peaceful and surrounded by nature.

From the moment we arrived, we felt at ease. The place was clean, well-equipped, and comfortable, with fresh bedding and a heater that kept us warm during the chilly nights. It’s a little farther from the port, but that means you’re closer to stunning nature spots and parks.

One of the best parts was the wildlife - koalas in the trees near our house, kangaroos wandering around, and beautiful birds everywhere. We even spotted echidnas and enjoyed amazing sunsets and a turquoise-colored beach nearby.

A big plus was the WiFi. While much of the island has little to no connectivity, the park has Starlink, so we could stay connected when needed.

If you’re looking for a quiet and comfortable place to stay on Kangaroo Island, this is a great choice, especially for couples wanting a relaxing getaway.

We brought our caravan from Melbourne and our stay here was just what we needed. Chris and Margaret were terrific hosts, very friendly and full of information about KI. Plenty of Koalas in the park which was wonderful to see.

Excellent Caravan Park located at the Western End of KI on the doorstep to the Flinders Chase National Park. |A great bush feel to the park with good spacing between sites.|Park well appointed with amenities and probably the best camp kitchen we have seen. |Park full of wildlife, Kangaroo’s, Koala’s and Birds. |Was definitely the best park we visited on KI and would recommend to anyone looking at going to KI

We stayed one night. Everything was good. Very kindly staff.
There is also some koalas and kangaroos.

Riesiger Platz mit wenig Parzellen. Wer Platz und Ruhe sucht, ist hier am richtigen Ort. Der Platz ist ideal für das Erkunden des Flinders Chase National Parks und des Südwestens der Insel. Die Duschen / WCs sind einzelne Badezimmer. Es hatte da zu wenig Ablageflächen aber ansonsten war das tiptop.
Great campsites, plenty of room, very friendly staff, well-stocked shop for a remote location and they even have petrol. We saw Roos, Koalas and a couple of Cape Barren geese. Highly recommended.

We camped at Discovery Park Kangaroo Island on a non-powered site for three nights and had a fantastic family stay. The playground and communal area with activities and a TV were great for the kids, and the shared kitchen was impressively well-equipped. Our kids especially loved seeing the wildlife up close. The convenience store was well-stocked, and the staff were friendly and knowledgeable. The location was perfect, with easy access to attractions on the west side of the island. Highly recommend!

We loved our stay at KI Discovery Park in Flinders Chase. We were in the 2020 built rooms and they were spotlessly clean! Netflix on the TV for a quiet night in, lots of koalas in the trees and even a volleyball net! The kitchen was big with everything you would need for a cook up. The rooms are small but expected in places like this and for the price! The park office/general store had all the essentials you could ever need. The staff at the park were passionate about their jobs, knowledgeable and more than helpful. This is a great place to bring either the family/caravan or just yourselves! We will be back again :)

Excellent location at Flinders National Park. Koalas and kangaroos.
If you are not a camper I would recommend a cabin instead of a motel room, as you are more in the nature area and the cabins also feature a terrace to enjoy and witness wildlife.

Clean!

Comm kitchen could use some additional items (e.g. only one knife, one cutting board, no glasses / cups)

A pochi minuti dall'ingresso ufficiale del Flinders Chase National Park. Il Discovery è un glamping con tutti i servizi necessari. Abbiamo alloggiato in un bungalow con cucina: dotato di tutto, confortevole, pulito e sufficientemente distanziato dagli altri alloggi per garantire quella privacy che ti fa sognare di essere da solo in mezzo alla natura! 😉 Canguri e koala nel loro ambiente naturale. Bellissima esperienza! 👍🏻

The reason I’m rating this hotel bad and I would actually give it a ZERO if I could is because they have given me the worst customer service I’ve received in my 10 years of traveling the world. I basically had issues finding a transportation company to take me to the motel given the distance and when I reached out before my arrival to the motel to ask for guidance-help to figure out how to best get me there they were not helpful and a lot of times took days to respond or sent a short response and didn’t provide me with helpful information. I did try my best to find a solution on my own given their lack of help but sadly no company was willing to take me or the ones that could were all sold out. On the day I finally gave up realizing I would not be able to make it there just like before I sent many messages asking for their help (and called them with no response)to find the best solution for me so I could cancel without a penalty given the circumstances but to my many messages all they replied back was single short message saying I needed to reach out to booking.com as they are the ones that manage the reservations. I went ahead and did and asked booking to cancel my reservation free of charge ( at this point the reservation was still within the time I could cancel and only pay half the price) but as they took over 3 days to respond just like to my previous sent messages I never got a resolution until they finally replied back rejecting my request saying I should have read the cancellation policies. This hotel not only failed to provide the proper guidance but also disregarded my many requests for assistance in canceling the reservation in a timely manner. If they had been transparent enough to tell me how basically the only way to get there is with a rental car I would have been able to make proper arrangements or cancel my reservation at the right time but they basically gaslighted me and blatantly ignored me and are forcing me to pay unfairly.

We absolutely loved our stay here, the staff were incredible with their efforts to make sure we knew all the sights seeing in KI. We did a bus tour for the Aurora lights, koala walk and had a cute little camp bbq with everyone. The amenities were always clean and tidy. It felt like we were at home, definitely recommend 🙂

Brilliant auto diesel service up this end of the island. Thanks for making that available to all.
(Also has unleaded).

Shop had good selection of the necessary and lots of ice creams!

Super friendly staff with great local knowledge

This is the best camping ground on Kangaroo Island. The sites are generous, the wildlife was magical and best of all - the showers were as good as our bathroom at home. Everything was clean and quiet, and such a great distance to Hanson Bay, Flinders Chase and Seal Bay. It is further from Kingscote, but we didn’t care about doing the drive for a better camp ground. An absolute gem!
Great Service and close to far end of the island

On the far side of the island , however every close to nature and Flinders national forrest
Nature up and close with Kangaroos and Koalas as you walk out
Great to for children
Facilities were great

Stopped here briefly for lunch as part of a tour cruise, so I can't comment on the accommodation however the picnic areas were lovely and we even saw some koalas. There's toilets on site and a camp kitchen we used, as well as coffee, small range of grocery items and local gifts available in the reception.
Such a lonely place. So many animals and a friendly (and efficient) staff
Cabin was amazing and couldn't rate the Park Managers enough! Super friendly, beyond helpful and a great stay. Thanks team!

Good place to stop when visiting the west of the island. Small but well equipped and clean chalets with everything you could need. Communal bbqs, free to use and koalas, kangaroos and geese to view. What more do you need! Friendly reception staff and so peaceful. Poor  Wi-Fi reception but so what!
As staying unpowered site for one night, all facilities were well-maintained.

Loved it - all but the excess amounts of wildlife poo, which means there was a lot of kangaroo, geese and koalas.
Staff was very very friendly but not too much so, very helpful.
We’ll be back!!

Excellent. C’est un camping qui dispose aussi de lodges. |Localisation idéale. Les animaux se promènent devant les lodges le soir et le matin.|Lodges impeccables. Très récents et parfaitement propres. Barbecue disponible.|Petite supérette à la réception.||Deux points d’amélioration :|- wifi de qualité variable,|- il y a peu de vaisselle dans le lodge.

cabins were booked out so got a motel style room instead. it was a block of some 10 rooms with a common room cum kitchen. room was smallish in size but served well for sleep. found it quiet enough despite being directly opposite the common room. probably depends on the mix of guests for the day. the bathroom was a bit problematic in that the shower cubicle was shallow and the shower curtain didn't reach down to the floor therefore water kept splashing out and wetting the whole floor. kitchen was good for simple cooking. there was a gas stove and microwave. was glad to find oil and seasoning. plenty of cutlery and crockery. location was great for wildlife sanctuary and flinders chase NP but far from main town so no option to dine out unless prepared to drive slowly and tackle ubiquitous wildlife on the road back at night. reception doubled as little tuckshop and was able to get minute steak. lovely wildlife in the park itself too!
I went here with my daughter's school trip. The owners were lovely and very helpful. And very patient putting up with so many children. We slept in tents so cannot comment on the rooms.

This was such a pleasant surprise. We were looking for accomodation on the west, and it was very limited. We stayed in a deluxe cabin for one night, but really wished we'd stayed for two!

We had our own bathroom, shower, kitchenette, TV and patio. Lovely to sit with cup of tea and watch the gorgeous geese, cuddly koala's and beautiful KI Kangaroos go by.

The staff were incredibly friendly, always went out of their way to tell you where the koala's and other wildlife were so you can get a good look, and were great guides to the national park. Thanks to the their recomendation, we went down to Remarkable ROcks & Admirals Arch at sunset - and it was the best most beautiful experience ever.

Thank you discovery parks!! We'll be back, and this time we'll stay longer!

Mucho cuidado si reservas en este hotel porque si te cancelan el ferry para ir a Kangaroo Island por mal tiempo (algo que te puede pasar), no te devuelven el dinero de tu reserva.
Tenía muchísimas ganas de ir a este hotel, sobre todo por el enclave en el que se encuentra, pero lamentablemente no nos fue posible ir: era imposible acceder a la isla por vientos huracanados. Nos cancelaron el viaje y no salían los ferrys durante 3 días.
Con todo el disgusto, y siendo de España, contactamos con las excursiones y alojamiento que teníamos en la isla, ya que no podríamos viajar a Kangaroo Island y todos se mostraron muy empáticos con nosotros y entendieron que, si no podíamos viajar porque no nos lo permitían, era lógico devolvernos el importe, ya que era una circunstancia ajena a nosotros. Todos menos este hotel, que se negó a devolvernos el dinero de la reserva. Nos dijeron que no iba con su política y que nos darían un voucher para disfrutar en otro momento, Como si fuese tan fácil viajar de España a Australia (señores, 24 horas de avión nos separan).
Así que nada, con todo el disgusto que tuvimos por tener que cancelar nuestro viaje a Kangarroo Island, nos tocó pagar un hotel que no disfrutamos.
Muy mala gestión por su parte y nada recomendable reservar con ellos porque he leído más de un blog que le cancelaron el ferry, así que debe ser algo bastante común en esta zona. Mejor que reservéis en otro que os aseguren que si no podéis viajar que os devuelvan el dinero.

Assolutamente consigliato! Bellissima struttura a qualche minuto di macchina dall'ingresso del Flinders Chase Park (questo vi permetterà di trattenervi di più nel parco, senza correre il rischio di guidare per troppo tempo dopo il tramonto a causa dei tanti animali).
Immersa nel verde, canguri, koala e altri animali che camminano liberamente nel parco.
Offre sia servizio di campeggio che piccoli appartamenti. Ottima pulizia, appartamento completo di tutto, cucina e aria condizionata calda e fredda. Wifi disponibile gratis, lavanderia. Benzinaio, bar e reception sul posto. Bellissima vista dal patio, con piccolo tavolino!
Bisogna portarsi dell’acqua in bottiglia, quella del loro lavandino non è potabile se non fatta bollire.
Nuit accompagnée de petits bruits de nos amis les kangourous (alias 🦘 KANGAROUS historique du mot kangorous).
Simple cabin with everything you need.  Clean and tidy.  Staff were amazing!  Very helpful and amazing local knowledge.
You get the feel of the wildlife here. It is near Flinder's National Park for exploration. You can also have close encounters with kangaroos within the camp site.

Stayed for a week on a powered site and explored the Island from there. Lovely helpful people manage this park. They went above and beyond for us, nothing was a bother and very knowledgeable on things to do/see
The best place to stay whilst exploring the west … friendly staff and a font of local knowledge……. Highly recommend 🌻

Excellent location - easy access to Flinders Chase National Park. New modern cabin that is properly insulated.

But WiFi is unstable inside the cabin - some devices can't connect to WiFi inside the cabin and can only connect when outside. Hot water pressure is insufficient - resulting in intermittent hot water.

Logement à proximité immédiate de Flinder's Chase. Toutes sortes d'animaux sauvages dans le parc, des kangourous bien sûr, mais aussi toutes sortes d'oiseaux et des koalas sauvages. Nous garderons plein de souvenirs de la faune autour de nous. Les cabines sont confortables et bien équipées mais n'oubliez pas de faire des courses à kingscote en arrivant sur l'ile: à proximité du parc les restaurants font cruellement défaut (à une bonne heure de route) et les aliments proposés à la "boutique" du logement sont très peu variés et très chèrs

Probably the best base to explore the Western end of the island. Easy access to the National Park for a visit  to the Remarkable Rocks and Admirals Arch.
Nicely kept site, clean and well equipped, catering for all needs from basic plots to comfortable, well-appointed cabins. Some of the shower blocks could benefit from a bit of modernisation, which is why this got 4 rather than 5 stars but otherwise heartily recommended.
Special mention for helpful, friendly staff and for being one of the few places in the west where you can fill the car up with fuel.

Tucked away in the extreme western corner of the island.   You can stay in spacious holiday houses (well-equipped and maintained) or camp.  If the site is full, it can get very noisy.  There is no shop, so stock up as there's nothing in the vicinity.

This is a great park to stay. It has everything you need even koalas up the gum trees. Very clean up to date kitchen area. Leave in the morning for day trips and come back to a relaxing bush Discovery Park.

Filthy facilities - typical of G’day parks. Don’t know why they can’t get cleaning right. Unfortunately forced to stay here as there’s no alternative nearby. We did bush camp after staying here though.
Clean and well managed facilities/camping/caravan Park. Lovely management team. Personal approach to visitors. Very happy.
Good place to stay on Kangaroo Island. All of the facilities were very helpful over our few days there. We had koalas and kangaroos right outside our camp spot!

We stayed in a deluxe cabin for 2 nights. You can easily spend a day driving here from Penneshaw (and another day going back) stopping along the way. One day here is enough to take in the main sites, more if you want to hike.||Everybody we met were friendly and helpful. The deluxe cabin is simple but comfortable with everything you need. We were very comfortable and it’s so silent - we slept incredibly well.||There are electric bbq’s around the park and other amenities.||Wifi works most of the time and we got decent Telstra 4G signal.||The shop has enough for basic meals plus wine at reasonable prices and other local produce (the olive oil is good) and they sell fuel.||There is incredible wildlife around. From our cabin we saw koalas, kangaroos, wallabies, geese and possums.

Nous y avons passé 3 nuits avec notre motorhome! Le service est super, les employés sont gentils et très aidants! Les salles de toilettes sont super propres! Sur le terrain même, on peut y voir des koalas, wallabies, des oies grises, et plusieurs beaux oiseaux! Génial! Et c’est tout près du Flinders Chase National Park! On vous recommande cet endroit!
Park facilities were great, staff were very helpful, amenities were clean and the location was ideal for exploring the south west side of the island
Wow, we are under koalas. New kitchen is very clean.

Service:
Sehr freundliche Mitarbeiter die immer gerne Helfen :)
5/5*

Preis:
55AUT$ pro Nacht für zwei Erwachsene auf einer Powered Site
Waschmaschine 5$
5/5*

Sauberkeit:
Es wird alles Täglich geputzt und ist demnach auch sehr sauber.
5/5*

Küche:
Die Küche ist sehr groß und mit allem mehrfach ausgestattet. (Töpfe, Pfannen, Teller usw...)
Auch Herd,  Grill und großem Kühlschrank inkl. Gefriehrfach sind kostenfrei nutzbar und immer sauber.
5/5*

Fazit:
Aus meiner Sicht ein empfehlenswerter Campingplatz von dem aus man fast die ganze Insel erkunden kann.
Es gibt Treibstoff direkt am Camp und auch sonst alles was man brauchen könnte und das zum fairen Preis
5/5*

Great place to base a trip to Kangaroo Island. Facilities all working well and kept very clean. Excellent cooking facilities and spacious sites.
Finally a thankyou to Raelee and Keith for a delicious pancake breakfast on the morning we left
We were really happy with the accomodation. The amount of wildlife around the cabin where we stayed really made it a memorable place. The facilities were very clean.

Great campsite, facilities are really good and kept very clean. You'll find everything you need in the camp kitchen. Location is perfect as it is very close to all national park. Staff were really nice. And you will see plenty of koalas in the trees. Unpowered site are good size and flat.
Great location for Flinders Chase NP and Hanson Bay Sanctuary. Very nice camp, large well equipped kitchen and clean amenities, and with resident koalas, wallabies and magpies.
Used facility as a lunch stop on a tour of kangaroo island. Clean and welcoming with friendly staff
My family have just stayed at this park. The staff here were extremely helpful and had lots of good info for exploring the western side of the island. Coffee from the office was great too.

Absolut zu empfehlen! Nettes Personal, geräumige, saubere und gut ausgestattete Cabins. Wilde Koalas und Kängurus innerhalb der Anlage. Für uns war es ideal, da wir einen 2-Tags-Trip auf der Insel machten und am ersten Tag den Norden erkundeten. Wir checkten ein am späten Nachmittag und fuhren dann noch in den Flinders NP, den wir ganz für uns alleine hatten. Wir würde hier immer wieder buchen!
Very nice new cabin. Lots of wildlife. Good location  for Flinders Chase NP.
What an amazing place! Slept in an independent house A paradise where you can sleep while hearing the sounds of koalas and admiring them in the trees inside the park.

Such a great park,  ideally set in the perfect spot to venture to the attractions in Flinders chase. Awesome camp kitchen and facilities. Koalas, Tamar wallabies and Kangaroos ventured through. The staff were very helpful and friendly. A pleasure to stay and really reccomend others to do so. OnYaSonya will be back again.
Amazing place to stay during travelling Kangaroo Island!Friendly staff helped us out to late check-in.Clean and well maintained place.Suggest you bring or buy a bottle of water to drink ;)
Great experience with wild animals,so many different things to see,cabins clean and lovely visitors writing notes,such lovely place to stay

Einfach ein wunderbarer Ort. Der Sternenhimmel nachts ist toll und tagsüber hat man Kangaroos, Hühnergänse, Papagaien und Koalas direkt vor der Haustür! Es gibt schöne Spazierwege dort. Wir waren sehr glücklich.
Camp kitchen was completed with big cooking facilities & full with kitchen utensils & cutlery. Wood fire 🔥🔥 in the kitchen.

The lady at the service desk and on the phone was very friendly. We got a good spot for our car and tents. The amenities were clean. We loved the big the kitchen and the possibility to light up a fire in the common room.
The camping ground is a great place to stay if you are just for two or three days on the island as you pass it after your half way around the island. It is also close to the Flinders Chase Nationalpark.
There are beautiful wildlife animals on the campingground as well.
We paid $30 per night for a unpowered spot in August.
What a great spot to spend a few days. The grounds are lovely and green, I must congratulate all the staff involved.

Friendly staff, helped us out of a jam. Only stayed one night as our ferry got cancelled but the cabin had everything we needed including ensuite and oven/stove so I was pleasantly surprised. We will keep them in mind next time we visit.
We recommend you to book ahead and go there without any hesitation. We thought it was far and it will be disappointing but it turned out to be one of the best cabins and services.
